name: Edison Model M
description: Mid-size electric sedan with 75 kWh battery (~400 km range) and highway driver-assist; seats five.

name: portable solar panel
description: Foldable 200 W monocrystalline panel with MC4 leads; outputs 20 V at 10A.

name: 200 Wh battery pack
description: 12 V 16 Ah lithium iron phosphate battery pack (≈200 Wh) with built-in BMS for renewable energy storage.

name: portable solar kit (wired)
description: 200 W folding panel, 30 A PWM controller, and 200 Wh LiFePO4 pack wired with MC4 leads, ring terminals, and strain relief for quick off-grid deployment.

name: 8 AWG fused cable kit
description: 1 m 8 AWG red/black leads with crimped ring terminals and 60 A MIDI fuse holder for safely feeding 12 V systems, from charge controllers to inverters.

name: 300 W pure sine inverter
description: 12 V DC to 120 V AC inverter rated for 300 W continuous, with low-voltage cutoff, cooling fan, and grounded AC outlets.

name: mounted 300 W inverter
description: 300 W pure sine inverter mounted within 30 cm of a 200 Wh battery pack using fused 8 AWG ring leads and torque-checked lugs.

name: load-tested inverter
description: Mounted 300 W inverter verified under a 150 W AC load with stable 120 V output and acceptable DC voltage sag.

name: off-grid phone charge log
description: Notebook entry confirming a full smartphone charge from the portable solar kit, cable strain relief, and cool-to-touch connectors.

name: charge controller profile set
description: Documented LiFePO4 settings for a 30 A controller: battery type, 14.4 V absorb, 13.6 V float, and temperature-compensated wiring check.

name: 9 V battery
description: 6F22 9 V alkaline battery (~550 mAh) for electronics projects and test equipment.

name: smartphone
description: 150 g smartphone, 6 in (15 cm) LCD, 128 GB flash, 4 GB RAM; 3000 mAh battery via USB-C (5 V, 15 W).

name: 500 W wind turbine
description: 500 W three-blade horizontal-axis wind turbine kit with integrated charge controller providing 24 V DC output.

name: wired 500 W wind turbine
description: Anchored 500 W turbine with brake tested and DC output wired through a charge controller to your DC bus.

name: 3D printed model rocket

name: 5 gallon bucket

name: cured compost bucket
description: Bucket of compost that has cooled after its hot phase, smelling earthy and ready to be screened.

name: screened compost blend
description: Fine, clump-free compost shaken through a sifter, ready for seedlings or top-dressing beds.

name: compost temperature log

name: compost moisture log
description: Moisture readings with probe depth and notes on squeeze test for a bucket compost run.

name: dCarbon
description: A token that is generated for every 1 kg of carbon dioxide generated in-game.

name: Hypercar (80% charge)
description: A futuristic electric vehicle with Fully Supervised Driving (FSD) capabilities. 80% charged.

name: dWatt
description: A token that represents 1 watt of electricity that can be consumed by machines. To acquire 1 dWatt, you need to either prepay the dCarbon cost, or generate and store it in a battery without accruing dCarbon.

name: Hypervan
description: A futuristic electric van with Fully Supervised Driving (FSD) capabilities.

name: dUSD
description: An in-game tokenized version of the USD currency. Not backed by or in any way associated with actual USD.

name: savings jar
description: Glass jar for storing dUSD. Breaking the jar releases all stored dUSD and leaves broken glass.

name: broken savings jar
description: Shattered remains of a savings jar after cashing out stored dUSD.

name: sink
description: Steel sink with faucet; ~50×40×20 cm basin (~5 kg). Provides tap water.

name: smart plug
description: Wi-Fi plug rated for 120 V AC loads up to 15 A (1.8 kW). Tracks energy use and schedules via app.

name: smart power strip
description: Four-outlet WiFi strip that monitors energy use and schedules devices remotely.

name: superglue
description: Small 3 g tube of cyanoacrylate adhesive for quick repairs. Bonds plastic and wood in seconds—avoid skin contact.

name: kevlar shock cord

name: static engine thrust log
description: Time-stamped thrust-curve capture from a secured static engine burn used for go/no-go interpretation.

name: temperature line chart
description: A simple Matplotlib graph showing your logged temperature readings over time.

name: annotated temperature graph
description: A cleaned plot with rolling averages and high/low annotations to make trends pop.

name: live temperature JSON endpoint
description: A lightweight API route that serves the latest thermistor reading as JSON on your network.

name: live temperature dashboard
description: An auto-refreshing web page that charts your live JSON endpoint for anyone on the LAN.

name: Photoresistor
description: A light-dependent resistor for measuring brightness.

name: 5 V Power Supply
description: A battery pack or USB adapter that provides a stable 5 V DC output.

name: 50 mm magnifying lens
description: Glass lens with ~50 mm focal length used as a telescope objective.

name: 20 mm magnifying lens
description: Small lens with ~20 mm focal length for use as a telescope eyepiece.

name: cardboard mailing tube
description: Sturdy cardboard tube about 40 cm long to hold telescope optics.

name: camera tripod
description: Aluminum tripod with 3-way pan head; extends 0.5–1.5 m, supports up to 3 kg, weighs 1.2 kg.

name: masking tape
description: Low-tack paper tape for temporarily securing lenses during assembly.

name: digital camera
description: Mirrorless camera capable of long-exposure astrophotography.

name: astronaut poster
description: 61×91 cm (24×36 in) matte poster on 150 g/m² paper; NASA crew, ~85 g.

name: mission logbook
description: A5 (148 × 210 mm) hardbound logbook with 200 pre-numbered pages for recording mission events and maintenance notes.

name: completionist trophy log entry
description: Logbook page noting the Completionist Award II serial, photo location, and display shelf.

name: weekly quest reminder
description: Calendar reminder pointing to the quest board each week with your chosen day and time.

name: bottle of black ink
description: 30 mL glass bottle of waterproof black ink for quill pens; screw cap prevents leaks; ~60 g.

name: feather quill
description: 20 cm goose feather quill with stainless steel nib; 3 g. Dip in ink for calligraphy.

name: roll of coins
description: Paper-wrapped roll of twenty 0.5 dUSD coins for arcade machines and small purchases.

name: soldered jumper wire
description: 10 cm 22 AWG stranded jumper wire with a soldered splice and 2 mm heat-shrink insulation; ~2 g.

name: mission log entry
description: One handwritten entry recording a mission event in the logbook.

name: shell transcript
description: Captured command session showing pwd, ls, grep, awk, and sed usage in a reproducible sequence.

name: command cheatsheet
description: Concise reference mapping core Linux commands to practical sysadmin use cases.

name: basic shell operator badge
description: Credential proving you can navigate Linux fundamentals and document your output.

name: resource snapshot
description: Timestamped CPU, memory, and disk baseline collected from Ubuntu monitoring commands.

name: remote node telemetry report
description: Monitoring dossier comparing local metrics with readings from a dedicated Raspberry Pi colony node.

name: observability checkpoint badge
description: Issued after completing multi-node health monitoring and baseline interpretation drills.

name: journalctl report
description: Exported journal slice capturing the latest service events for incident triage.

name: incident log extract
description: Focused tail output containing the most recent high-signal lines from a system log.

name: incident response analyst badge
description: Recognition for turning journalctl and tail outputs into actionable incident evidence.

name: fizz reaction cylinder sample
description: A labeled graduated cylinder holding the post-fizz solution (water, weak acid, dissolved carbonate salts). Marked as chemical waste requiring neutralization and proper disposal.

name: safe fizz reaction log sheet
description: A lab notebook page recording reagent ratios, bubbling profile, peak temperature, and disposal note for the spent fizz solution.

name: chemistry pH reading card
description: A timestamped pH strip card taped to a note with sample source and interpretation range for chemistry lab verification.

name: diluted hydrochloric acid solution
description: A clearly labeled beaker of diluted HCl prepared by adding acid to water. Includes concentration/date label and storage/disposal caution.

name: neutralized spill waste container
description: Collected absorbent and salts from a neutralized acid spill, sealed and tagged for hazardous-waste pickup.

name: buffer solution batch
description: A prepared buffer in a labeled beaker with composition notes and expected pH range before final tuning.

name: pH-adjusted buffer solution
description: Buffer solution tuned to target pH and labeled with before/after readings, reagent additions, and handling notes.

name: precipitation reaction slurry
description: Cloudy reaction mixture showing newly formed solids suspended in solution before filtration.

name: filtered precipitate sample
description: Recovered precipitate and decanted liquid documented for follow-up analysis and disposal routing.

name: moon crater sketch sheet
description: Detailed A5 observation sheet documenting lunar phase, local seeing conditions (1-5 scale), and labeled crater rim shading from a 20-minute telescope session; includes timestamp, azimuth, and weather notes for repeatability.

name: telescope build alignment card
description: Stiff cardstock alignment card with measured focal spacing marks, tube centering notes, and tripod balance settings used to tune a hand-built telescope for stable nighttime viewing.

name: andromeda acquisition log
description: Two-page star-hop record tracing Mirach to Andromeda with eyepiece orientation arrows, estimated surface brightness notes, and a confidence score for re-acquisition on future nights.

name: iss timing callout sheet
description: Field checklist listing pass start/end times, maximum elevation, compass bearings, and verbal timing cues used to coordinate eyes-up spotting without losing situational awareness.

name: iss long-exposure photo print
description: 4x6 in archival print of a continuous ISS trail crossing a dark sky with annotated exposure settings, capture timestamp, and compass heading to preserve photographic proof of the flyover for posterity.

name: galilean moon position chart
description: Session chart plotting Io, Europa, Ganymede, and Callisto positions relative to Jupiter across multiple timestamps, with seeing notes and mirror-flip correction markings.

name: constellation route atlas page
description: Annotated atlas page showing completed seasonal star-hop route, naked-eye anchor stars, and fallback waypoints used when haze obscured intermediate patterns.

name: binary star split verification card
description: Observation card recording magnification used, focus micro-adjustments, and color contrast notes confirming repeated visual separation of a binary pair over multiple attempts.

name: skyglow gradient worksheet
description: Site worksheet capturing horizon-by-horizon sky brightness estimates, glare source directions, and mitigation ideas (screening, timing, shielding) for future observations.

name: aurora activity timeline
description: Timeline sheet correlating aurora arc brightness changes with local time, camera settings, and cloud cover windows to support later analysis and storytelling.

name: lunar eclipse phase sequence strip
description: Sequential strip of hand-timed eclipse phase notes (penumbral, partial, totality) with color descriptions and edge-shadow sketches captured at regular intervals.

name: meteor tally board
description: Night tally board with directional radiant estimates, brightness classes, and minute-by-minute meteor counts, including excluded false positives like aircraft traces.

name: comet drift comparison sheet
description: Comparison sheet overlaying comet position against fixed stars across nights, including tail length estimates and transparency ratings for each session.

name: north-star alignment card
description: Durable card documenting Polaris lock procedure, improvised sightline checks, and landmark bearings used to establish reliable nighttime orientation in the field.

name: orion nebula glow sketch
description: Field sketch capturing the Orion Nebula core brightness gradient, wing structure hints, and star anchor references used to validate the observation under varying seeing.

name: planetary alignment witness chart
description: Witness chart recording relative planetary spacing, altitude bands, and horizon reference objects during a narrow alignment window for later verification.

name: satellite pass classification notes
description: Classification notes distinguishing likely satellites from aircraft by steady brightness, non-blinking tracks, and predicted path agreement.

name: saturn ring division sketch
description: Observation sketch marking ring tilt angle, Cassini-division visibility confidence, and focusing tweaks that produced the clearest ring separation.

name: star trail composition plan
description: Long-exposure composition plan with tripod orientation, foreground framing marks, and interval timing strategy used to build clean circular or arcing trails.

name: sunspot transit notebook page
description: Solar session notebook page with filtered-view safety checklist, sunspot group coordinates, and progression arrows showing apparent transit across the disk.

name: venus phase progression card
description: Progression card comparing observed Venus crescent/gibbous outlines over time, with elongation notes and atmospheric steadiness comments for each attempt.

name: safe reaction bench setup sheet
description: Signed checklist confirming beaker, cylinder, PPE, waste cup, and ventilation staging before reaction start.

name: safe reaction dosing tray
description: Labeled reagent tray containing pre-measured vinegar and sodium bicarbonate portions for staged addition.

name: pH kit calibration log
description: Reference-strip calibration record showing lighting conditions, timestamp, and reader initials.

name: conditioned pH sample vial
description: Room-temperature, degassed aliquot prepared for consistent strip-based pH measurement.

name: HCl dilution molarity worksheet
description: C1V1 worksheet documenting target molarity, transfer volumes, and hazard labeling details.

name: ice-bath dilution flask
description: Pre-chilled dilution vessel held below 30C to control exothermic heating during acid additions.

name: acid spill containment berm
description: Absorbent perimeter barrier used to isolate spill spread and protect drains during neutralization.

name: sealed neutralization residue drum
description: Rigid sealed drum containing neutralized spill solids, absorbent liner, and disposal chain label.

name: buffer formulation recipe card
description: Calculated buffer formulation card with acid/base ratio, target pH, and ionic strength assumptions.

name: compounded buffer stock lot
description: Initial compounded buffer lot before final pH verification and labeling.

name: buffer adjustment titration plan
description: Stepwise titration plan estimating dropwise acid/base additions required to hit pH window.

name: buffer adjustment cycle log
description: Per-cycle log of reagent drops, stir times, and intermediate pH readbacks during adjustment.

name: precipitation reagent staging set
description: Stoichiometrically prepared reagent pair with sequence card for controlled precipitation.

name: washed precipitate cake
description: Twice-rinsed precipitate solids collected before final filtration and sample packaging.

name: milled stevia feedstock
description: Low-moisture, uniformly milled stevia leaf feedstock prepared for solvent extraction.

name: clarified stevia filtrate
description: Ethanol-water stevia extract filtrate after coarse solids removal and first clarification pass.

name: seeded stevia crystal slurry
description: Supersaturated stevia concentrate seeded for controlled crystal nucleation and growth.

name: dried stevia crystal lot
description: Partially refined crystal lot dried below 45C prior to final polishing wash.

name: stevia sensory calibration cup set
description: Coded baseline cups used to align panelists on sweetness scale before blind tasting.

name: stevia panel scorecard
description: Structured sensory scorecard with onset timing, intensity, bitterness, and confidence metrics.
